sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70995" key="nomo/qetis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νομόθετ-ις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νομοθέτης,</foreign> coined as expl. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεσμοθέτις,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
